ginsengfoodV2AgentContext.g1: Initial operational baseline for go-live schema, seed, production-order snapshot, material issue, trace, recall, and validation.
ginsengfoodV2AgentContext.futureVersions: Support approved G2/G3+ with activation, immutable snapshots, audit, and retirement.
ginsengfoodV2AgentContext.g0: Research/baseline context only; never active in operational seed, production, material issue, costing, trace, recall, or handoff.
ginsengfoodV2AgentContext.routePolicy: Map current code routes before route changes; do not create parallel route families from documents.
ginsengfoodV2AgentContext.validation: Report applicable backend, frontend, migration, seed, and smoke gates with exact commands or blockers.
ginsengfoodV2AgentContext.processLifecycle: Stop only agent-owned long-lived PIDs before handoff, run dotnet build-server shutdown after agent-run .NET build/test/EF commands, and never kill broad dotnet/node/npm process names.
